channel.title: Html on Qianqian Shan
channel.description: Recent content in Html on Qianqian Shan

item.title: HTML Basics
item.description: The notes were taken based on the tutorial from https://www.w3schools.com/html/default.asp. Contents 1.Introduction Introduction HTML stands for Hyper Text Markup Language. Basics <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <body> <h1>My First Heading</h1> <p>My first paragraph.</p> </body> </html> <p> : paragraph <a href="http://www.w3school.com.cn">This is a link</a> : link <img src="w3schools.jpg" alt="W3Schools.com" width="104" height="142"> : image with source name in src , alternative text in alt <button>Click me</button> : button Lists are defined with the <ul> (unordered/bullet list) or the <ol> (ordered/numbered list) tag, followed by <li> tags (list items)
